scripts.build-exe: node --experimental-sea-config sea-config.json && npx postject gramy.exe NODE_SEA_BLOB sea-prep.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2
scripts.build-srv: npm run build-node && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync(process.execPath, 'gramy.exe')"  && npm run build-exe
